name: Bone Radiograph

findings.technique: Radiographs of the [anatomic region] were obtained in [standard projections].

sections.name: Bone Cortex
sections.content: Bone cortex [is intact / no cortical break / no fracture identified]. No periosteal reaction.

sections.name: Bone Medullary Canal
sections.content: Medullary canal [is intact / no lytic or blastic lesion / no abnormal mineralization].

sections.name: Joint Spaces
sections.content: Joint spaces [are preserved / no joint space narrowing / no osteoarthritis]. No effusion.

sections.name: Soft Tissues
sections.content: Soft tissues [are unremarkable / no soft tissue mass / no calcification].

impression:
1. [No acute fracture / No acute abnormality].
